description: Registry of all AI knowledge artifacts for the React Fast Template. Used by platform adapters (Claude Code, Copilot) to discover and load rules, skills, agents, and protocols.

rules.summary: Feature-Sliced Design boundaries enforced by eslint-plugin-boundaries. Features cannot import from other features. Shared layers (components/hooks/lib/types/utils) cannot import from features/app.
No console.log. No nested ternary. Strict equality (eqeqeq). Boolean naming (is/has/should/can/did/will/are). Blank line before return. id-length ≥2.
Always use @/ alias — no ../../ imports. No import cycles. Strict import order (builtin → external → internal → parent/sibling → index → object), alphabetized.
No `any` (use unknown + narrow). prefer-destructuring + prefer-optional-chain. Boolean variables/params must use is/has/should/can/did/will/are prefixes.
Files and folders are kebab-case. Hooks start with use*. Components are PascalCase exports in kebab-case files. Test files: *.test.ts(x). Story files: *.stories.tsx.
Components ≤150 lines (warn). Split smart and dumb components. Single Responsibility — one component, one job.
Use cn() from @/utils/cn for class merging. CVA for variant-based components. Tailwind v4 CSS variables for theme tokens. Reuse shadcn primitives in src/ui/.
Each feature can have api/components/hooks/stores/types/utils/assets — only the subfolders it needs. No circular dependencies between features. No barrel files unless they aid tree-shaking.
Component tests via Vitest + React Testing Library. Use jest-dom matchers. Hook tests via renderHook. E2E via Playwright. No render without cleanup leaks.

skills.summary: Feature-Sliced Design layout. Features in src/features/<name>/. Boundary rules enforced by eslint-plugin-boundaries.
Smart vs dumb components. Hooks pattern. ≤150-line rule. Composition over inheritance.
File-based routing in src/routes/. Type-safe links. Search params with Zod validation. Loaders + pendingComponent.
queryOptions pattern, query key factory per feature, mutation onSuccess invalidation, suspense queries.
Slice selectors (no whole-store reads). persist middleware with partialize. Combine with immer if needed.
RHF + @hookform/resolvers/zod. Schema in feature/types/*.schema.ts. Type via z.infer.
shadcn/ui wrappers in src/ui/. CVA for variants. cn() for class merging. Tailwind v4 + CSS variables for tokens.
Use shared api instance from @/lib/api. Feature API files in features/<feat>/api/. Response interceptor unwraps response.data.
react-error-boundary for UI errors. Query error states. Mutation error toast pattern.
Vitest + RTL component tests. jest-dom matchers. renderHook for hooks. Playwright for E2E in three browsers.
*.stories.tsx co-located. CSF3 format. Addons: a11y, docs, vitest, onboarding.
ESLint + Prettier + tsc as quality gates. Lint:fix, format, build for type check.
Conventional Commits generator. Stages, analyzes diff, picks type+scope, writes message. Pre-commit: lint-staged runs.
Squash all branch commits into one vs main. Preserves ticket refs. Asks user confirmation.
Combined: commit current changes then squash branch into one. Sequential orchestration of git-commit + git-squash.
PR description generator. Title under 70 chars. Sections: Summary, Test plan, Screenshots.
Protocol for adding new skills/rules. Template-based, manifest-registered, duplicate-checked.
DAG pipeline engine for multi-step tasks. 11 atomic nodes, 5 seed scenarios. Topological sort, memoization, branch pruning.
Branch format (feature|bugfix|refactor)/<ticket>/<desc>; drop ticket when none. One branch per feature; stack dependent PRs off the parent branch.
Stage + commit + push. Split unrelated changes into one Conventional Commit per concern before a single push. Never --no-verify, never force a shared branch.
Isolated-worktree workflow: fork off a base branch, implement, lint changed + test, logical commits, push, open a draft PR. Composes git-branch + git-commit-push + pull-request-description.
Counterpart to worktree-task. Verify clean + pushed, git worktree remove, then checkout the branch in main repo. Refuses to discard uncommitted/unpushed work without --force.

Surface architectural friction, propose deepening refactors via the deletion test, present as an HTML report (Tailwind + Mermaid), then grill on the chosen candidate. Informed by CLAUDE.md + .claude/rules/.

Interview the user one question at a time about a plan/design until shared understanding. Walks the decision tree, recommends an answer per question, explores the codebase instead of asking when possible.

agents.summary: Reviews code against ai/rules/. Runs lint + type check. Never modifies code.
Audits FSD boundaries, import cycles, feature isolation, shared-layer purity.
Writes Vitest + RTL tests following react-testing skill. Writes to *.test.ts(x) only.
Syncs project docs with code changes. Writes to docs/ and ai/ only.
Creates new skills/rules following self-expansion protocol. Writes to ai/ only.

protocols.summary: Post-task quality check. Scopes: quick (lint), standard (lint+build), full (lint+build+test).
How agents create new skills/rules. Template → manifest → verify.
Tiered context loading. Never load all skills. Max 5 per task.
Sub-agent delegation: parallel for independent tasks, sequential for dependent.

templates.description: Standard template for creating new enforcement rules.
Full template for creating new knowledge skills.
Standard template for creating new sub-agent personas.
Template for creating new DAG pipeline scenarios.

engine.description: DAG pipeline engine for complex multi-step tasks. See ai/engine/ and ai/README.md §4.
